question: Can the selected checkpoint produce a validated checkpoint-map and ephemeral-object context before OMAP/root traversal?

positive_oracle.source: detached proof images with existing successful raw namespace comparisons
positive_oracle.expected: checkpoint map chain reaches CHECKPOINT_MAP_LAST and mapped ephemeral objects validate

negative_oracles: descriptor ring wraps beyond configured limit
mapped object size is zero or not block-aligned
short read from checkpoint data area
